title: Rechsteineria cardinalis
taxonomy: Rechsteineria cardinalis is classified as a species of lichenized fungus. It belongs to the genus Rechsteineria, which is part of the family Pyrenulaceae. Rechsteineria cardinalis is further classified as a type of lichen that grows on rocks and trees. The classification of Rechsteineria cardinalis is within the kingdom Fungi and the phylum Ascomycota. This classification reflects the organism's unique characteristics and its place within the larger fungal kingdom.
